oracle.note: Rule-based oracle is optimised for Task 3 triage; Task 1 stage prediction uses action-space heuristics which under-fit extreme stages.

always_alert.note: Always-alert achieves 0.50 on Task 3 because it catches all anomalies (TP=5) but accumulates heavy FP penalties.

dqn.note: DQN trained on Task 3 episodes (1500 eps). Strong on Task 1 via observation-space heuristics. Weak on Task 2 (7-step format not seen during training).
